subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! We have heard thy call, and the Ancient Beauty hath turned His countenance from the Most Great Prison towards His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ندایت را شنیدیم و وجه قدم از سجن اعظم باحبای خود متوجه بوده و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
